heading: Travel card management
label: 2766 Travel card management
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 517 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 517 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary may require that travel or transportation allowances due a civilian employee or military member of the Coast Guard be disbursed directly to the issuer of a Federal contractor-issued travel charge card, but only in an amount not to exceed the authorized travel expenses charged by that Coast Guard member to that travel charge card issued to that employee or member.

children.heading: .—Withholding of Nondisputed Obligations
children.label: b .—Withholding of Nondisputed Obligations
children.text: The Secretary may also establish requirements similar to those established by the Secretary of Defense pursuant to for deduction or withholding of pay or retired pay from a Coast Guard employee, member, or retired member who is delinquent in payment under the terms of the contract under which the card was issued and does not dispute the amount of the delinquency.section 2784a of title 10
